MOTION Notice Of Motion For Order To Charge Parner'S Partnership Interest
Off Calendar Apr-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The tentative ruling was for hearing required. There being no appearances, the Court ordered United California Bank's Motion for Order to charge Partner's Partnership Interest was ordered off calendar. (JJM/MD) Joyce Long, CSR 8620

Employer'S Motion For Order Resolving Conflits Between Charging Order In Case No. 300937 And Earnings Withholding Order In Case No. 305525
Off Calendar Jan-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ed Sangster, Esq. of the LAW FIRM OF KIRKPATRICK & LOCKHART 249-1028 for KIRPATRICK & LOCKHART LLC (employer of judgment debtor Christopher Rillo) moving to resolve conflicts between charging order in case no 300937 and earning withholding order in case no. 305525
Wayne A. Silver, Esq. 408/720-7007 for judgment creditor ABA STAFFING, INC. opposing party
Joseph N. Demko, Esq. 398-8080 for UNITED CALIFORNIA BANK fka Sanwa Bank California
Julian O. Standen, Deputy Attorney General 703-5535 for real party in interest FRANCHISE TAX BOARD

Having heard from all counsel, the Court makes the determination that judgment debtor CHRISTOPHER RILLO is a salaried employee. (JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
